description_long: This is a black baseball cap featuring a prominent Harley-Davidson Motor Cycles logo patch on the front panel. The cap has a structured, rounded crown with a fabric-covered button at the top and a wide, flat brim extending from the front. The rear of the cap is open, likely for size adjustment, and the material appears to be a durable woven fabric, possibly cotton or a cotton blend. The logo patch is embroidered in orange, white, and black, adding a bold decorative element. The overall finish is matte with a slight texture, typical of casual streetwear hats. The cap is designed for comfort and style, suitable for urban environments and outdoor activities.
description: A black baseball cap with a wide, flat brim and a large Harley-Davidson Motor Cycles logo patch on the front. The cap has a structured, rounded crown and an open back for adjustment.
description_view_0: Front view showing the Harley-Davidson Motor Cycles logo patch centered on the crown and the wide, flat brim.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the smooth, uninterrupted fabric of the crown and the profile of the brim.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the open back, likely for size adjustment, and the fabric-covered button at the crown's top.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the edge of the logo patch and the continuous fabric construction of the crown and brim.
